name: token-wand
description: Token Wand — Color Token System for Figma

scripts.prebuild: node -e "if (!require('fs').existsSync('./node_modules') || !require('fs').existsSync('./node_modules/tailwindcss')) { console.log('Missing dependencies. Running npm install...'); require('child_process').execSync('npm install', {stdio: 'inherit'}); }"
